entities.teacher: a teacher pointing at the whiteboard

scenes.title: The Spelling Lesson
scenes.background_prompt: A classroom with a whiteboard at the front showing a sentence, a teacher's desk, student desks in rows, and educational posters. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A bright classroom during a lesson. A teacher in a button-down shirt and slacks stands at the front, pointing with a marker at a sentence written in large clear letters on the whiteboard. The sentence reads: 'The dogs is playing in the park.' A student — a girl of about nine with a raised hand and an eager expression — sits at a front desk, clearly having spotted the error. Other students sit at their desks in rows behind her. Educational posters about grammar and vocabulary decorate the walls. A teacher's desk with a mug and papers sits to the side. The fluorescent lights are bright and the room feels active and engaged.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place teacher at the front, standing and pointing with a marker at a sentence on the whiteboard. Place student at a front desk, sitting with raised hand and eager expression. Other students at desks behind her.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground of this classroom scene, a student with brown hair, wearing a blue and yellow striped shirt, green pants, and a green backpack, sits on a small wooden chair on the left, raising his right hand. To his right, another student with brown hair in a red shirt and blue pants sits at a wooden desk, looking toward the center. Further right, a third student, a girl with brown hair in a yellow shirt and blue pants, sits at another desk. Several empty wooden desks and chairs are arranged in rows across the light brown wooden floor. In the midground, a large whiteboard with a wooden frame occupies the left side, displaying the sentence "THE DOGS IS PLAYING IN THE PARK." written in black. A teacher with brown hair tied back, wearing a green sweater and blue jeans, stands to the right of the whiteboard, pointing at the text with a black marker. To her right is a large bulletin board with a green scalloped border, featuring a world map, an alphabet strip, a number chart, and various diagrams. Next to the bulletin board stands a two-door wooden cabinet, and on the far right is a tall wooden bookshelf filled with colorful books. In the background, large windows reveal a sunny outdoor setting with a grassy field dotted with small flowers, several large green trees with brown trunks, and a bright blue sky filled with soft white clouds.
